overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style video game. The player character walks through neon-lit industrial alleyways at night, passing by an electronics shop and various NPCs. The environment features wet pavement, steam vents, and dense industrial architecture with prominent red and purple neon lighting.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily past the electronics shop, observing the shopkeeper behind the counter

notable_agents.action: shopkeeper standing behind the counter looking toward the street

entered.detail: vertical neon sign with red lettering reading ELECTRONIC
open shop counter with display items and warm interior lighting
exposed metal pipes and conduits running along the wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow cyberpunk alleyway, passing a brightly lit electronics shop on the right. The shopkeeper stands behind the counter as neon red lights illuminate the wet pavement. Industrial pipes line the walls in this enclosed urban corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: side alley with utility boxes and trash

events.description: character turns left into a narrow side passage between buildings

agents.ego_description: turning left into a side alley, passing by NPCs gathered near trash bags

notable_agents.action: NPC in green shirt standing near utility boxes
NPC in brown jacket walking toward the character

entered.detail: black garbage bags piled against the wall
metal electrical utility boxes and panels
dark doorway entrance to a building

segments.scene_description: The character turns left into a narrower side passage filled with trash bags and utility boxes. Two NPCs are present - one standing near the wall and another walking past. The industrial pipes recede into the background as the character enters this more confined space.

events.description: steam vent releases white vapor into the air near the elevator

agents.ego_description: walking through an open industrial area toward an elevator, passing pedestrians

notable_agents.action: NPC in purple jacket walking across the courtyard

entered.detail: purple neon sign reading ELEVATOR with arrow
metal elevator doors with yellow interior lighting
pipe releasing white steam into the air
yellow caution barrel on the ground

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a more open industrial courtyard featuring a prominent elevator with a purple neon sign. Steam vents release vapor into the air as the character passes by a yellow caution barrel. An NPC in a purple jacket walks across the area while industrial pipes line the right wall.

agents.ego_description: continuing down a narrow corridor with red metal walls

entered.detail: corrugated red metal wall with attached pipes
distant exit with green light visible at corridor end

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds down a narrow industrial corridor with distinctive red metal walls and exposed piping. The elevator area falls behind as the character moves toward a distant lit exit. The space is empty of other people, focusing on the industrial architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit urban labyrinth that shifts from a commercial alleyway into a stark industrial corridor. It begins by following the character past a brightly lit electronics shop where red neon reflects off wet pavement and industrial pipes line the walls. As the character turns left, the environment tightens into a narrow side passage cluttered with trash bags and utility boxes, passing by a few idling NPCs. The scene then opens into a wider industrial courtyard filled with drifting steam from vents, featuring a purple neon elevator sign and a yellow caution barrel. Finally, the camera proceeds away from the open area and into a confined corridor of red metal walls and exposed piping, moving toward a distant lit exit.
